name: Beyonce
bio: Beyonce combines touring, catalog performance, and premium brand power into one of pop's strongest earning profiles.
notable_for: Beyonce remains closely associated with Halo and Crazy in Love, which still anchor attention around the catalog.
career_highlight: Songs like Halo and Crazy in Love still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming sustains earnings after the original release cycle ends.
Playlist use and rediscovery keep durable songs in circulation.
Licensing and long-tail audience demand extend catalog value over time.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from global streaming scale, album catalog depth, touring halo, songwriter participation, and premium licensing value.

ownership.master_owner: Label-distributed masters with meaningful artist-side participation across the catalog
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears shared across Beyonce, co-writers, producers, and publishers
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No broad catalog sale adjustment is applied
ownership.notes: Artist-side share is directional because exact master and publishing contracts are not public.
